name: Neverfull MM
description: The Neverfull MM tote unites timeless design with heritage details. Crafted from supple Monogram canvas with natural cowhide trim, it is roomy yet not bulky.

name: Capucines BB
description: Named after the Rue des Capucines in Paris, where Louis Vuitton opened for business in 1854, this Capucines BB handbag is beautifully crafted from full-grain Taurillon leather.

name: Keepall Bandoulière 50
description: An icon since the appearance in 1930, the Keepall embodies the spirit of modern travel. Light, supple and always ready for immediate departure.

name: LV Trainer Sneaker
description: Designed by Virgil Abloh, the iconic LV Trainer sneaker is revisited in Monogram denim. The elaborate construction of this model takes Louis Vuitton artisans seven hours to stitch.

name: Star Trail Ankle Boot
description: The Star Trail ankle boot, one of Louis Vuitton's most recognizable designs, is crafted from Monogram canvas with black calf-leather trim. It features a high heel and a treaded rubber outsole.

name: Monogram Classic Scarf
description: The Monogram Classic scarf is woven from a soft, warm mixture of silk and wool. It is distinguished by its tone-on-tone Monogram pattern, offering a subtle signature.

name: Tambour Street Diver Watch
description: The Tambour Street Diver brings the Tambour watch into the realm of high-end sports. Robust and highly legible, it combines traditional diving features with vibrant, unconventional style.

name: Silhouette Ankle Boot
description: The Silhouette ankle boot is crafted from smooth calf leather. Its signature is its Monogram Flower-shaped heel, a testament to Louis Vuitton's craftsmanship.

name: LV Initiales 40mm Reversible Belt
description: This LV Initiales 40mm reversible belt features Monogram canvas on one side and solid black calf leather on the other, fastened with a gleaming LV signature buckle.

name: Silk Monogram Pajama Shirt
description: A relaxed yet refined pajama shirt tailored from fluid silk twill featuring an allover Monogram print. Perfect for lounging or elevated streetwear.
